channel.title: Cpp on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Cpp on Arrans github.io

item.title: slint-ui/slint
item.description: Slint is an open-source declarative GUI toolkit to build native user interfaces for Rust, C++, JavaScript, or Python apps.

item.title: compiler-explorer/compiler-explorer
item.description: Run compilers interactively from your web browser and interact with the assembly

item.title: k2-fsa/sherpa-onnx
item.description: Speech-to-text, text-to-speech, speaker diarization, speech enhancement, source separation, and VAD using next-gen Kaldi with onnxruntime without Internet connection. Support embedded systems, Android, iOS, HarmonyOS, Raspberry Pi, RISC-V, RK NPU, Axera NPU, Ascend NPU, x86_64 servers, websocket server/client, support 12 programming languages

item.title: pawelsalawa/sqlitestudio
item.description: A free, open source, multi-platform SQLite database manager.

item.title: jrouwe/JoltPhysics
item.description: A multi core friendly rigid body physics and collision detection library. Written in C++. Suitable for games and VR applications. Used by Horizon Forbidden West and Death Stranding 2.

item.title: juce-framework/JUCE
item.description: JUCE is an open-source cross-platform C++ application framework for desktop and mobile applications, including VST, VST3, AU, AUv3, LV2 and AAX audio plug-ins.

item.title: uowuo/abaddon
item.description: An alternative Discord client with voice support made with C++ and GTK 3

item.title: WerWolv/ImHex
item.description: 🔍 A Hex Editor for Reverse Engineers, Programmers and people who value their retinas when working at 3 AM.

item.title: iDescriptor/iDescriptor
item.description: A free, open-source, and cross-platform iDevice management tool

item.title: xeco23/WasIstLos
item.description: An unofficial WhatsApp desktop application for Linux.

item.title: eProsima/Fast-DDS
item.description: The most complete DDS - Proven: Plenty of success cases. Looking for commercial support? Contact info@eprosima.com

item.title: media-kit/media-kit
item.description: A cross-platform video player & audio player for Flutter & Dart.

item.title: frol/completely-unscientific-benchmarks
item.description: Naive performance comparison of a few programming languages (JavaScript, Kotlin, Rust, Swift, Nim, Python, Go, Haskell, D, C++, Java, C#, Object Pascal, Ada, Lua, Ruby)

item.title: nguyenchiemminhvu/LinuxNetworkProgramming
item.description: A comprehensive guide for Linux Network (Socket) programming
